subject: feat(pwa): apply standardized install/update patterns to implementation
body:
Applies all patterns from the cross-repo audit to glow-props' actual pwa.js:
- Data-driven getInstallInstructions() replaces hardcoded HTML strings
- Benefits section in install modal (offline, dock, full-screen)
- appinstalled event listener cleans up state on successful install
- Focus trap on install modal for keyboard accessibility
- Reusable showToast() with DaisyUI semantic colors and exit animation
- Coarse browser detection with iOS/macOS split inside instructions
- backdrop-blur-sm on modal, 1s Safari/Firefox fallback timeout

Tags: pwa, install, accessibility, ux, standardization
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: minor
